title: Sozu Frontend Configuration
description: Configuration for a frontend routing rule in the Sōzu HTTP reverse proxy. A frontend binds an incoming request pattern (hostname + path prefix) to a backend cluster.

route_id.description: Unique identifier for this frontend route.

address.description: IP:port listener address for this frontend.

hostname.description: HTTP Host header value to match for this frontend route.

path_prefix.description: URL path prefix to match for this frontend route (empty string matches all paths).

cluster_id.description: Identifier of the backend cluster to forward matched requests to.

https_redirect.description: Whether to redirect HTTP requests on this frontend to HTTPS.

sticky_session.description: Whether to enable sticky sessions for this frontend.

certificate.description: TLS certificate configuration for HTTPS frontends.
